title: Restaurant Zur Haxe
setting: A traditional Berlin restaurant. 19:00. You meet a colleague for dinner and need to order in German.

npc.name: Herr Weber
npc.personality: friendly colleague, uses casual 'du' at dinner. Warm and talkative.
npc.initialLine: Guten Abend! Schön, dass du Zeit hast!
npc.initialTranslation: Good evening! So nice you have time!

debriefRu: Sie treffen sich mit einem Kollegen zum Abendessen in einem Berliner Restaurant. Bestellen Sie auf Deutsch und unterhalten Sie sich.
debriefEn: You're meeting a colleague for dinner at a Berlin restaurant. Order in German and make conversation.

turns.instruction: Greet your colleague and say it's nice to see them.

prompt.ru: Hallo! Schön, dass wir uns treffen.
prompt.phonetic: HAH-loh! Shurn, dass veer oons TREFF-en.
prompt.en: Hi! Great that we're meeting up.

turns.instruction: Say you're hungry and suggest looking at the menu.

prompt.ru: Ich habe Hunger. Sollen wir mal die Speisekarte anschauen?
prompt.phonetic: Ikh HAH-be HOON-ger. ZOL-len veer mahl dee SHPY-ze-kar-te an-SHOW-en?
prompt.en: I'm hungry. Should we look at the menu?

turns.instruction: Ask what they recommend on the menu.
Say you'll have the schnitzel and ask if they're ready to order.

prompt.ru: Ich nehme das Schnitzel. Bestellst du auch?
prompt.phonetic: Ikh NAY-meh das SHNIT-sel. Be-SHTELST doo owkh?
prompt.en: I'll have the schnitzel. Are you ordering too?
